Class DRAxisPlot

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.AbstractBasePlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.DRAxisPlot
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIAxisPlot, DRIBasePlot, DRIPlot, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DRBarPlot, DRBubblePlot, DRCandlestickPlot, DRDifferencePlot, DRHighLowPlot, DRLinePlot, DRMultiAxisPlot, DRXyBlockPlot, DRXyStepPlot
public class DRAxisPlot extends AbstractBasePlot implements DRIAxisPlot

DRAxisPlot class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
